headline: Teradyne (TER) to Showcase Physical AI Robotics at Automate 2026
summary: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the 10 Best Debt-Free American Stocks to Invest In. On June 11, 2026, Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) said Teradyne Robotics will demonstrate how physical AI is transforming industrial automation at Automate 2026 in Chicago from June 22-25. headline: Teradyne (TER) Joins The Nasdaq 100 As It Lands A $139.9 Million Air Force Deal
summary: Teradyne (NasdaqGS:TER) is set to join the Nasdaq-100 index on June 22, increasing its visibility with large index and ETF investors. The company has secured a multi-year US$139.9 million contract with the U.S. Air Force for diagnostic test station kits. The Air Force agreement expands Teradyne's exposure to government and defense spending beyond its core semiconductor test and robotics operations. Teradyne operates at the intersection of semiconductor test equipment, industrial automation...
